_comment: Plugin MCP servers. Launched via `uvx --from git+<repo>` so a marketplace install just needs `uv` on PATH — uv builds polydig + deps into an ephemeral, cached env at first launch (no manual pip, no PyPI publish required). LOCAL DEV: `pip install -e .` then swap a server to {"command":"python","args":["-m","polydig_mcp.news.server"]} to test working-tree code instead of the pushed version. FinMind token optional (.env); FRED/TWSE/RSS/crash-watch work without it.
